name: Pudding Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, chocolate pudding mix, and baking powder in a bowl.
2. Mix well until combined.
3. Melt the butter in a saucepan over low heat.
4. Remove the pan from the heat and beat one egg at a time into the mixture.
5. Blend in the vanilla extract and remaining ingredients (pudding mix, sugar).
6. Pour the batter into an 8-inch square baking pan.
7. Bake for 35 minutes at 350°F, ensuring not to overbake.
8. Allow to cool in the pan before serving or cutting into bars.
